headline: Alex Jiménez
body: 🚨🟣 Fiorentina are set to sign Alex Jiménez on loan deal from Bournemouth, as SkySport reports. Verbal agreement on loan move with buy option clause at €20m and medical underway in Florence today.
raw_text:
🚨🟣 Fiorentina are set to sign Alex Jiménez on loan deal from Bournemouth, as @SkySport reports.

Verbal agreement on loan move with buy option clause at €20m and medical underway in Florence today.
text:
